rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component implementation annexes for deployment bindings
Use 'assign' statements for deployment bindings in AGREE annex blocks
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions match exactly with visible identifiers from the model
Treat each AGREE annex block as scoped to its owning component implementation
generic_rules: Use 'assign' statements for implementation-level bindings in AGREE annex blocks
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions match exactly with visible identifiers from the model
Treat each AGREE annex block as scoped to its owning component implementation
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'assign output = expression;' syntax for assignments in AGREE annex blocks
Use 'annex agree {** ... **};' syntax for AGREE annex blocks
Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not invent ports/components or copy identifiers from examples
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables without proper exposure in the model
